flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Shawnee State University are 21% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($39.6k vs $50.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Shawnee State University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.6k → $17.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Shawnee State University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5k → 2.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Shawnee State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).
